classes.label: Position
classes.description: A job or post held by a person in an organization.
evidence: JCJG020515 主管或从事的工作

classes.label: Social Part-time Job
classes.description: A part-time role held in social or political organizations such as the People's Congress, CPPCC, or democratic parties.
evidence: JCJG030102 社会兼职起始日期
JCJG030103 社会兼职终止日期
JCJG030104 社会兼职辞职原因码

classes.label: Academic Group
classes.description: An academic society or association where a person holds a part-time role.
evidence: JCJG030203 学术团体隶属或主管单位
JCJG030205 学术兼职起始日期
JCJG030206 学术兼职终止日期
JCJG030207 学术兼职辞职原因码

classes.label: Advanced Study
classes.description: Further education or training activities undertaken by a person.

classes.label: Organization
classes.description: An organizational entity such as an employer, approving authority, or supervising unit.
evidence: JCJG030203 学术团体隶属或主管单位

datatype_properties.label: Position Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Code indicating the category of the position.

datatype_properties.label: Position Level Code
datatype_properties.description: Code indicating the level of the position.

datatype_properties.label: Appointment Date
datatype_properties.description: Date when the appointment takes effect, as officially notified.

datatype_properties.label: Appointment Method Code
datatype_properties.description: Code indicating the method of appointment.

datatype_properties.label: Appointment Reason
datatype_properties.description: Reason for the appointment.

datatype_properties.label: Appointment Document Number
datatype_properties.description: Document number of the appointment notice or announcement.

datatype_properties.label: Position Change Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Code indicating the category of position change.

datatype_properties.label: Current Position Status
datatype_properties.description: Current status of the position.

datatype_properties.label: Position Sort Order
datatype_properties.description: Order number of a leading cadre within the leadership group.

datatype_properties.label: Supervised or Engaged Work
datatype_properties.description: Work supervised or engaged in.
evidence: JCJG020515 主管或从事的工作

datatype_properties.label: Removal Date
datatype_properties.description: Effective date when the removal from the position is approved.

datatype_properties.label: Removal Method Code
datatype_properties.description: Code indicating the method of removal.

datatype_properties.label: Removal Reason Code
datatype_properties.description: Code indicating the reason for removal.

datatype_properties.label: Removal Document Number
datatype_properties.description: Document number of the removal notice or announcement.

datatype_properties.label: Social Part-time Job Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the social part-time job held in organizations such as the People's Congress or CPPCC.

datatype_properties.label: Social Part-time Start Date
datatype_properties.description: Approval date of the social part-time job appointment.
evidence: JCJG030102 社会兼职起始日期

datatype_properties.label: Social Part-time End Date
datatype_properties.description: End date of the social part-time job.
evidence: JCJG030103 社会兼职终止日期

datatype_properties.label: Social Part-time Resignation Reason Code
datatype_properties.description: Code indicating the reason for resigning from the social part-time job.
evidence: JCJG030104 社会兼职辞职原因码

datatype_properties.label: Academic Group Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the academic society or association.

datatype_properties.label: Academic Group Level Code
datatype_properties.description: Code indicating the level of the academic group.

datatype_properties.label: Academic Part-time Position
datatype_properties.description: Part-time position held in the academic group.

datatype_properties.label: Academic Part-time Start Date
datatype_properties.description: Approval date of the academic part-time position.
evidence: JCJG030205 学术兼职起始日期

datatype_properties.label: Academic Part-time End Date
datatype_properties.description: End date of the academic part-time position.
evidence: JCJG030206 学术兼职终止日期

datatype_properties.label: Academic Part-time Resignation Reason Code
datatype_properties.description: Code indicating the reason for resigning from the academic part-time position.
evidence: JCJG030207 学术兼职辞职原因码

datatype_properties.label: Advanced Study Nature Code
datatype_properties.description: Code indicating the nature of the advanced study.

datatype_properties.label: Study Method Code
datatype_properties.description: Code indicating the method of study.

object_properties.label: has appointment organization
object_properties.description: The organization where the position is held or that approved the appointment.

object_properties.label: has removal organization
object_properties.description: The organization that approved the removal from the position.

object_properties.label: has supervising organization
object_properties.description: The organization that the academic group is affiliated with or supervised by.
evidence: JCJG030203 学术团体隶属或主管单位

object_properties.label: has approval organization
object_properties.description: The superior department that approved the overseas trip and issued the approval document.

relations.subject: AcademicGroup
evidence: JCJG030203 学术团体隶属或主管单位
